column1: Hey Jonas, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Missed your response bro my bad!
Bet tho, which destination were you lookin to book?
Occidental, but we're still checking out what fits my crews vibe
Word bro. What vibe are y'all into? I've stayed there a few years in a row
We have an array of personalities, so flexibility in terms of lazy beach vacation and crazy parties would be huge. Really trying to avoid any shitty budget feel. And less insane drunk people
Yea bro. I feel that for sure. Think I got the perfect balance for you
How many of you in the group?
7. And refundable if possible. Couple hoops players that may be playing playoffs if they make it
Got it. Will add the insurance add on option which will cover that
Which school you all from brotha?
Fire bro, I'm sure yall started pre season already. Squad lookin good?
They should be fine. Lots of young talent came in so we'll see soon enough
What do the packages look like?
I'll put that together for you right now, how soon were yall lookin to get started?
I'll put that together for you right now, how soon were yall lookin to get started?
I'll put that together for you right now, how soon were yall lookin to get started?
We're all sitting around watching football talking about it, so we're weighing our options now
Also is it cool if I send most the info through email? It's a little hard for text
And yea Jacobs is selling my fantasy hard
just sent that over bro lmk if you got it
Looking at it now. We're discussing. I'll shoot you a text probably tomorrow. Booze cruise looks dope
Also what's the deal on the insurance/ refundability? We'd only need 2 people to have the refund insurance
And maybe break down exactly what the party pass is? Sorry not trying to be a nuisance haha
Word bro. I can hook it up with a discount on the price there too

The insurance covers up to 75% of your payments if you ever need to cancel for any reason. When you make your deposit you'll be prompted to add insurance to your account. The 2 ppl should 100% do that. It's through our insurance partner Travel Insured. Usually costs about $50-100 to add on
The party pass is for the events we have at nightclubs off of the resort. It covers transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at those nightclub events. I'll send a few vids over
heres the booze cruise https://youtu.be/Is4RzNfxeZg and heres and example of one of the nightclubs, imagine cave https://youtu.be/RXvcdVqvARU

Awesome yeah I think we're ready to book. It says 50 off when we deposit, does that apply for each of us? And We're thinking about the party pass but if you hook us up we'd be much more interested haha
Lol bet, yea I'll knock $50 off the price so itll be the $649 4 person rate. it'll apply to everyones slot
and the party pass, that $200 bundle is the hook up. you get 3 of the nightclubs added to your package. Imagine Cave, Maroca, and Coco Bongo. along with the booze cruise for booking tonight
Love it. Now we can upgrade to 2 heads a room on our own and still keep that discount right?
we can do 2 per room yea, let me see what I can finesse for pricing cause 2 per room is usually $899 per person
might be able to get you more than $50 off on that, gimme a sec
Aight bro so just emailed over the reservation. the email has deeper step by step details on how to get on. I was able to finesse $799 on the 2 person room with the booze cruise included

heres the reservation portal https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/DZJNEOVO21 you'll see the original pricing initially but when you click into join trip you'll see the discount on the net page

Thank you so much spiffy. I will send everyone the link, and we should be good and signed up with deposits tomorrow. And last question since there are 7 of us, is there any shot we could either get 4 rooms at 799 each or just get one room with 3 heads? It just says 8 on our trip details I just want to be extra sure

Np bro. And so since its an all inclusive resort with all you can eat and all you can drink, rooms are priced on a per person basis, rather than per room basis like they are here at home. so that 4th room, essentially would be a 1 person room. so it would have the 1 person room rate (which is crazy pricey im not even sure what it is lol)
so, best game plan, two rooms of 2, and one room of 3

which actually will bring the price down for everyone. let me know which you want to do out of these two options - everyone pays $769 across the board, or, the guys that will have 3 in a room pay $729 while the others pay the $799
Let's do the split 729 and 799. I think ittl incentivize some of them to bite the bullet and go 3 to a room haha
facts, someones gotta do it lol
but bet bro, feel free to slot in yourself at the top, get situated, and send out for the guys to tap in. im gonna knock soon but around for any last min questions if you got it
Got all set. I'll let you know in the morning for anything else thanks for the help
got you brotha, np enjoy the night. chat in the morning
my dog. lmk how we lookin today I'm around to answer any of the questions the guys have. if any
Looking good. Just paid my own deposit. Getting everyone else set up in a minute. For some reason it says it's overdue, but I'm sure that's not an issue.... is it?
nahh you good bro, only showing that cause its due today
everyone will be fine to hop in
Any chance you can push the first deposit date a day? A couple guys are still waiting on family approval.
Oh word, let me make sure yea, should be good
whats good bro, pushed the deposit back a day for those few. everything lookin aight for them?
yerr whats up bro, any word on Jack and those two other open slots?
I have no clue I think they're dragging they're feet
yerr brodie checkin in. those 3 guys plan on hoppin on the reservation? just wanna make sure ops team doesnt close those down before they do
yoo whats good bro checkin in. we still on board with this trip?

Hey man sorry for ghosting. Finals had most of my focus. I just made my full payment, and I have the rest of my guys doing it now. We're actually down to just 4 guys on the trip now. Me (jonas), Reid Vanslette, Benjamin Brockway, and Jack McGrath. The other boys are either too broke or don't want to interfere with their season. Is that ok? Can you accommodate that?
Also, Jack McGrath, for some reason has two spots, but it only made payments on one. Is there any chance you can delete one of those accounts?
Just for clarity, four guys two rooms.
Okay cool bro, all good. So, two rooms of 2?
Jonas bro! whats good my man
who did you want slotted in your room with you?
yoyoo, is reid still going on the trip?
Yessir. Is he behind on payments
yeaa he is bro. ming hitting him up and letting him know
would hate to see him lose his spot
Hey spiffy! All four of us are paid!
Looks like Ben is the last one that needs to pay the balance
Oh shit ok lemme reach out
Bettt. next step bro, when you get your flights, add your flight info onto your account
Hey spiffy. Just wanted to check in one more time to see if we need anything else to be done before we leave. I filled in my flight info and everything else outstanding
yoo! yea bro is Jack and Benjamin on the same flight as you?
Benjamin is. Jack is not. I will have jack put in his info
Reid is on my flight as well
cool just added ben's flight in there
yeooo can you let Jack know to enter in his flight info
He just sent it in! Thanks for letting me know
Also is our group signed up for the booze cruise?
y'all all locked in for cruise. did you want to add any of the other party pass events?
Actually, I wanted to take a look at them. For some reason the webpage for add ons on the trip isn't showing us anything. But yes we are curious
word I got you I'll send the prices
Coco Bongo: $79 per person Imagine: $89 per person Maroca: $69 per person Booze Cruise: $79 per person
comes with coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
We had a chat about it last night. I don't think we wanna leave the property. The booze cruise is gonna be fun and beyond that we want to be pretty lazy.

We do have a couple questions about amenities though. We saw that there are tennis courts and basketball courts. Do they offer equipment? Also a bit of a longshot, but does accidental offer yoga classes by any chance.?
And for reservations, we want to make dinner reservations virtually every night, and from what I'm seeing online is that these reservations fill up pretty quick. Is there a place we can do that?

Yooo. Okay word yea the booze cruise is lit for sure. And there are both tennis and bball yup. There's a desk area by the gym where you can go and ask for a basketball or tennis equipment And for yoga, I've actually never done it or seen it myself, but I know the resort does offer it. I'm not sure what days or times it usually is, I can def find out but our onsite staff can also give you that run down when you get there

For dinner reservations you do that after checking in as well. There are some pretty dope spots. They let you lock in 3 at a time. Soon as you get settled in I'd head to the concierge desk in the lobby and get all of that locked in
He produces his own stuff if you want his SoundCloud

Are you a DJ??? My buddy is a dj and is asking about how you guys book sets and stuff. He said if possible he'd want to do a set at one of the pool events. Might be a long shot but I think you might be the right guy to talk to
Yeaa bro thats wassup. I'm not the actual DJ but I do run the entertainment bookings. Everything is booked out pretty far in advance, def coulda looked at things earlier
All good. Thank you so much you've been super helpful. We're all excited for tomorrow
yo! hope travels been safe today brother. lmk if y'all need anything

Thanks spiffy! We had a safe flight and we landed around noon. we've been at the resort for a few hours and we're having a blast already. Our fourth is pulling up soon and we want to take him somewheretonight on the property. Do you have any recommendations on what to do tonight and what would you recommend for the dress code?
By the way thank you for being so helpful and responsive. We're all so fired up for the next couple days
We figured it out don't sweat it!
Checkin in on your brother, how's everything going
Great thank you! Talking to lots of birds and have met lots of great guys. We got a free room upgrade too. We're flying high

Spiffy bro. We're on our flight back now. Thank you so so much we had so much fun. We want to go thru you guys next year too and with a much much larger group. Hopefully we can stay in touch and we can work together to get that done in the future 🙏🙏
My dog, I was told your groups was super nice to staff. I appreciate that
Lets def run it up for next year bro and stay in touch. whats your IG?
